Read our Policies

Rooms & Technology

Read with Libby

Read ebooks and listen to audiobooks from our library. Download the Libby app on your phone or tablet.

Looking for Overdrive?

Read ebooks and listen to audiobooks on Overdrive.

Need A Movie?

Kanopy offers more than 30,000 films, including critically acclaimed movies, inspiring documentaries, award-winning foreign films, and more.

Need a quiet place to attend a court meeting?

Visit our Access to Justice page to find out to use the Morse Institute Library to attend court remotely.

Login to LibApps

Our mission is to inspire minds, enrich lives, enable learning, and foster connections throughout our community by providing open and equal access to cultural, intellectual, and community resources.
